creator: niclas.zeising@gmail.com
text:
A new version of amavisd-new has been released, containing bug fixes. Amongst other our local patch to avoid sending double rejection notifications is now part of the release.  For details see the release notes.

Fix: Attached patch updates amavisd-new to version 2.6.6, which is the latest stable release.  Apply it with patch -E to remove the now un-needed file files/patch-amavisd.
How-To-Repeat: 	N/A
